_readme: This file is OPTIONAL. The Green Book box is fully automated by default — Claude finds and link-checks a real Black-owned business and a real opportunity every day, labeled 'Auto Spotlight.' Add an entry here ONLY when you have a real paying sponsor who wants a guaranteed slot instead of the automated pick — that entry will be used instead and labeled 'Sponsored.' The daily script always uses the FIRST item in each list, if present. Both lists below are genuinely empty right now - do not add sample/placeholder content, only real sponsors.
